name: pgstack-skillpack
description: Canonical repo-level skills for PGStack + PGBrain shared kernel.

skills.name: signal-detector
skills.description: Detect durable inbound signal without blocking the main response.

skills.name: brain-ops
skills.description: Enforce brain-first lookup, source discipline, and write-back rules.

skills.name: personal-gstack
skills.description: Clarify, plan, red-team, implement, verify, persist, operate, and retro durable work.

skills.name: llm-wiki
skills.description: Compile raw sources and durable conclusions into the Obsidian wiki.

skills.name: ai-daily-brief
skills.description: Maintain the Hermes-operated AI Daily Brief pipeline.

skills.name: query
skills.description: Answer from PGBrain and the local wiki using brain-first lookup.

skills.name: ingest
skills.description: Route source material into raw, wiki, brain, state, or runbook surfaces.

skills.name: enrich
skills.description: Apply tiered enrichment to durable objects and update compiled truth.

skills.name: maintain
skills.description: Run lint, relink, promote, reroute, log, and doctor cycles.

skills.name: repo-architecture
skills.description: Choose the correct PGStack/PGBrain filing surface.

skills.name: agent-router
skills.description: Route durable work across native GStack/GBrain private paths, Codex, Hermes, MultiCA/ACP exceptions, AgentHost, jobs, minions, and memory write-back.

skills.name: minion-orchestrator
skills.description: Route recurring or background work to Hermes, jobs, or future minions.

skills.name: source-discovery
skills.description: Expand and test information sources through review-only source gates.

skills.name: research-brief
skills.description: Convert enriched source packs into concise research briefs.

skills.name: team-memory-gate
skills.description: Decide memory scope and promotion eligibility.

skills.name: skillify
skills.description: Turn repeated successful work into reusable skills.

skills.name: testing
skills.description: Validate the shared kernel, skillpack, and PGBrain engine.
